message:
fix: iOS Safari WASM compatibility

Three fixes for iPhone:

1. Remove importmap — Safari < 16.4 doesn't support importmaps
   and their presence can interfere with module resolution. The
   motion library now uses a direct esm.sh URL in the dynamic
   import() call instead of a bare 'motion' specifier.

2. Replace Object.create(rawMod) with plain {} — Module namespace
   objects are exotic objects. Object.create on them can fail on
   iOS Safari/WebKit. Now uses a plain object and copies all
   exports explicitly.

3. Replace template literal in dynamic import with string concat —
   import(`${base}/index.js`) → import(base + '/index.js') for
   broader engine compatibility.

Also: better error logging when WASM fails to load, with iOS
version guidance in the console message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
